model: two-tier: workspace CEO coordinates; project agents run as parallel detached background processes and report up

dispatch.note: Jobs spawn as detached bash processes (PID files at org/jobs/<job-id>.pid, logs at org/jobs/<job-id>.log). cmux is DISPLAY ONLY — never used to execute jobs.

provider_waterfall.note: Each provider is an agent CLI + its account. The workspace CEO skips codex to preserve its quota. The 'omp' lane (oh-my-pi) is opt-in and routes to OpenRouter/Groq/xAI/Mistral/etc. — set CEO_OMP_MODEL (e.g. openrouter/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6) + the key in ~/.config/omp.env. Lockout files: org/ceo/runs/.<provider>-blocked-until

workspace_ceo.note: Single top-level loop: cockpit render → dispatcher → change-gated brain. Pause: touch org/ceo/runs/STOP; resume: rm it. cmux refs drift across restarts — resolve live panes via `cmux tree`.

workspace.note: Maintenance lane for the workspace itself (housekeeping, consolidation, doc hygiene). Bootstrap it with: scripts/bootstrap-project.sh workspace

cost_control.note: The CEO brain fires only when watched inputs changed (content hash, not mtime). Max 3 parallel jobs. Scout/read-only jobs use a cheap fast model.

safety_gates: No emails, DMs, forms, public posts, deploys, pushes, wallet actions, or transactions without explicit human approval.
Preserve dirty product-repo state unless the human explicitly asks to clean it.
Prefer read-only worker jobs until a project-specific edit scope is approved.
The CEO must draft (*.draft.md) + queue human approval before overwriting any PROJECT_CONTROLLER_PROMPT.md.
Email tooling may draft/append ONLY — never a send verb from any agent.
